creator: The Beneficial Principles In Tawheed, Fiqh, & 'Aqeedah - Abuu Rizq Mundhir Ibn Muhammad
description: On today's show, 1:30 pm CT, 2:30 pm ET: Trumped Charges: Alan Dershowitz warns there's 'no chance' Trump gets acquitted in NYC, claims Judge, jurors 'don't have the courage' - Bragg violated Trump's 6th Amendment rights in refusing to disclose underlying crime claims legal expert - O'Keefe captures N.Y. D.A. on hidden camera outside Trump hearing complaining about Constitution - FEC member claims Bragg's case against Trump contains 'not a violation of any kind' - we'll examine. Faith Under Pressure: Minneapolis sued for violating 1st Amendment with protest ban - 186 churches sue regional body for halting disaffiliation process - One in Four Anglican Churches no Longer Holding Regular Sunday Services - we'll explore. Plus, Mobster Whitey Bulger's nephew, a Hunter Biden business associate, scored White House visit when Biden was VP. And, Jobless Claims Hit 228,0000 - what does this forecast? https://www.spreaker.com/show/christian-talk-that-rocks https://christiantalkthatrocks.net or http://christiantalkthatrocks.com
subject: reason and sound thinking
title: Christian Talk That Rocks with Richie L. Ep. 4/6/2023
